hypothesis: Observed PWV improves 0-2 h heavy-rain prediction when encoded as an atmospheric state and fused with radar in latent space; correctly aligned PWV must outperform a train-time spatially displaced PWV control.

model.name: PWVLatentFusionNowcastNet
model.radar_initialization: same matched 0-2 h radar checkpoint for every variant
model.fusion: independent PWV encoder; radar-query/PWV-key-value cross-attention at the 1/8-resolution generative latent; learned feature gate
model.recursion_constraint: PWV never enters the recursive radar source or motion equations
model.auxiliary_task: predict future PWV during training only
model.fine_tuning: radar path at 0.1x learning rate; new PWV/fusion modules at 1x learning rate

variants.radar_only: radar checkpoint continued for the same extra epochs at the radar-path learning rate
variants.pwv_aligned: real geographically aligned PWV for training and evaluation
variants.pwv_displaced: independent random large cyclic PWV displacement per training sample; deterministic half-domain cyclic displacement for evaluation

excluded_controls.zero_pwv: removed; it duplicates radar identity or creates an inference-time distribution shift
excluded_controls.temporal_reverse: not primary because the first model tests the full observed state sequence and spatial information
excluded_controls.recursive_signed_source: falsified by the preceding pilot due to accumulated false alarms

development_budget.checkpoint_selection: validation rain weighted-L1; PWV auxiliary loss is logged but does not select checkpoints
